places.name: The Shady Dell
places.description: Collection of vintage trailers double as hotel rooms.

places.name: Erie Street, Historic Lowell
places.description: A living snapshot of a different time in America is preserved and maintained by a community of volunteers.

places.name: Bisbee Stairs
places.description: Stairs often replace streets on the steep slopes of this old mining town.

places.name: Mule Pass: Not Quite the Continental Divide
places.description: A mistaken marker makes an erroneous claim along the historic Old Divide Road.

places.name: Lavender Pit
places.description: This open-pit mine is now an abandoned symbol of Bisbee's copper-mining heritage.

places.name: Copper Queen Hotel
places.description: This Old West hotel, the longest in continuous operation in the state of Arizona, is claimed to be haunted.

places.name: Warren Ballpark
places.description: One of America's oldest stadiums was also the site of one of the most brutal anti-labor acts in American history.
